title: ReservoirLevel
description: A point-in-time observation of a reservoir in the NYC water-supply system, normalized from the wide 'Current Reservoir Levels' dataset (zkky-n5j3, 25 columns of cryptic per-reservoir SCADA tags such as NICRESVOLUME / RECRESELEVANALOG). One row of the source table describes the whole system at one timestamp; this schema breaks it out to one reservoir per record so agents can ask 'how full is Cannonsville?' without decoding sensor tags.

reservoir.description: Reservoir / controlled lake in the Catskill, Delaware, or Croton system.

capacityPercent.description: Percent of usable capacity in storage (derived).

conservationRelease.description: Conservation-flow release, cubic feet per second (e.g. 'WDICONFLW').

directRelease.description: Direct / spillway release, cubic feet per second (e.g. 'RECREL', 'WDRFLW').

system.description: Which of the three NYC water-supply systems the reservoir belongs to.
